id.description: Sequential id within a single stress-test run

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the command was called

category.description: ECABridge category as returned by GetCategory(), e.g. 'PhysicsAsset', 'Niagara', 'UMG'

task.description: Build-script task this call belongs to, e.g. 'character-physics-asset', 'hud-mvvm-binding'

expected.description: One-line description of what the agent expected to happen

outcome.description: ok = worked as expected; warn = worked with caveat (missing fields, surprising param names, undocumented behavior); fail = errored OR verify call showed write didn't land

response.description: Raw response from the command (the JSON-RPC result.content[0].text payload parsed back to an object when JSON, else the raw text)

verify_call.description: Round-trip read call to confirm the write landed (mandatory for any authoring command)

match.description: Did the read-back match the expected post-write state?

notes.description: Free-text observation about the call — what surprised the agent, missing fields, unclear errors, etc.

improvement.description: If outcome is warn or fail, the agent's suggestion for what should change in ECABridge to fix this

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock duration of the command call in milliseconds
